    { "id": "d-agency", "term": "agency", "verbatim_text": "The term ‘‘agency’’ has the meaning given the term in section 3502 of title 44, United States Code.", "normative_status": "statute", "as_of_date": "2022-12-19", "grounding_span": "meaning given the term in section 3502 of title 44,", "location": "SEC. 3 (introduced)" },
    { "id": "d-acc", "term": "appropriate congressional committees", "verbatim_text": "The term ‘‘appropriate congressional committees’’ means the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs of the Senate; and the Committee on Oversight and Reform of the House of Representatives.", "normative_status": "statute", "as_of_date": "2022-12-19", "grounding_span": "the Committee on Homeland Security", "location": "SEC. 3 (introduced)" },
    { "id": "d-ai", "term": "artificial intelligence", "verbatim_text": "The term ‘‘artificial intelligence’’ has the meaning given the term in section 238(g) of the John S. McCain National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2019 (10 U.S.C. 2358 note).", "normative_status": "statute", "as_of_date": "2022-12-19", "grounding_span": "in section 238(g) of the John S. McCain National", "location": "SEC. 3 (introduced)" },
    { "id": "d-director", "term": "Director", "verbatim_text": "The term ‘‘Director’’ means the Director of the Office of Management and Budget.", "normative_status": "statute", "as_of_date": "2022-12-19", "grounding_span": "The term ‘‘Director’’ means", "location": "SEC. 3 (introduced)" },
    { "id": "d-ai-system", "term": "artificial intelligence system", "verbatim_text": "The term ‘‘artificial intelligence system’’ means any data system, software, application, tool, or utility that operates in whole or in part using dynamic or static machine learning algorithms or other forms of artificial intelligence ... and does not include any common commercial product within which artificial intelligence is embedded, such as a word processor or map navigation system.", "normative_status": "statute", "as_of_date": "2022-12-19", "grounding_span": "is embedded, such as a word processor or map", "location": "SEC. 3 (reported)" },
    { "id": "d-department", "term": "Department", "verbatim_text": "The term ‘‘Department’’ means the Department of Homeland Security.", "normative_status": "statute", "as_of_date": "2022-12-19", "grounding_span": "means the Department of Homeland Security.", "location": "SEC. 3 (reported)" },
    { "id": "d-innovative", "term": "innovative", "verbatim_text": "the term ‘innovative’ means any new technology, process, or method, including research and development; or any new application of an existing technology, process, or method.", "normative_status": "statute", "as_of_date": "2022-12-19", "grounding_span": "any new application of an existing", "location": "SEC. 7(a) (introduced)" }
  ],
  "claims": [
    { "id": "cl-inventory", "claim_text": "The head of each agency shall prepare and maintain an inventory of the agency's AI use cases, including current and planned uses.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "prepare and maintain an inventory of the", "location": "SEC. 5(a) (reported)" },
    { "id": "cl-identify-usecases", "claim_text": "The Director shall identify new use cases for the application of AI-enabled systems to support interagency or intra-agency modernization initiatives that link siloed data sources.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "shall identify 4 new use cases for the application of", "location": "SEC. 6(a) (reported)" },
    { "id": "cl-priority-ppt", "claim_text": "The Director shall prioritize modernization projects that would benefit from commercially available privacy-preserving techniques.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "prioritize modernization projects that", "location": "SEC. 6(b)(4) (reported)" },
    { "id": "cl-risk-eval", "claim_text": "The Director shall require agency heads to evaluate risks in utilizing AI systems and develop a risk mitigation plan.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "evaluate risks in utilizing artificial in", "location": "SEC. 6(b)(3) (reported)" },
    { "id": "cl-contract-privacy", "claim_text": "Contracts for the acquisition of an AI system or service must address protection of privacy, civil rights, and civil liberties.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "address protection of privacy, civil", "location": "SEC. 4(d) (reported)" },
    { "id": "cl-sunset5", "claim_text": "The AI hygiene subsection shall cease to be effective 5 years after the date of enactment.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "effective on the date that is 5 years after the date of", "location": "SEC. 4(d)(5) (reported)" },
    { "id": "cl-directory", "claim_text": "The Director is encouraged to designate a host entity and ensure creation and maintenance of an online public directory of agency AI use cases.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "designate a host entity and ensure the creation and", "location": "SEC. 5(b) (reported)" },
    { "id": "cl-capability-data", "claim_text": "The established AI capability shall solve data access and usability issues and eliminate or minimize manual data cleansing and harmonization efforts.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "solves data access and usability issues", "location": "SEC. 6(b)(6) (introduced)" },
    { "id": "cl-ig-bias", "claim_text": "The Inspector General shall identify training to guard against bias in the selection and conduct of audits and investigations.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "guard against bias in the selection and", "location": "SEC. 4(c) (introduced)" },
    { "id": "cl-threshold", "claim_text": "Section 880(c) of the NDAA FY2017 is amended by striking $10,000,000 and inserting $25,000,000.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "and inserting ‘‘$25,000,000’’", "location": "SEC. 7(a) (introduced)" },
    { "id": "cl-scrm", "claim_text": "The General Services Administration is encouraged to pilot commercial off the shelf supply chain risk management tools.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "encouraged to pilot commercial off the shelf sup", "location": "SEC. 7(c) (reported)" },
    { "id": "cl-tmf", "claim_text": "The activities required under the pilot section shall be an allowable use under the Technology Modernization Fund.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "shall be an allowable use", "location": "SEC. 6(b)(6) (introduced)" },
    { "id": "cl-consult-nist", "claim_text": "In developing considerations for securing training data and algorithms, the Director shall consult with NIST and the Director of National Intelligence.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "Director of the National Institute of Standards and", "location": "SEC. 4(d)(2) (reported)" }
  ],
